org.docgene.model.globals

Class ArticlesGlossary.Word

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesGlossary.Word
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ArticleReference, ElementReference, HTMLOutput, ParagraphArticleReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement, XMLParent
    Enclosing class:
    ArticlesGlossary

    public class ArticlesGlossary.Word
extends AbstractXMLParent
implements HTMLOutput, StyledElement, ParagraphArticleReference
    Represents one Word in the glossary.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent

        chapters, paragraphs
